basic_details.job_title: IIT Tirupati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati (IIT Tirupati) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Andhra Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: B.S.-M.S. 5-year Integrated in Physics/Mathematics or 2-year M.Sc. in Physics /Mathematics or B.S./B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Engineering Physics/ or M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics and Communication with minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, Valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET including LS and/or JRF and/or valid JEST score
qualification.details: B.S.-M.S. 5-year Integrated in Physics/Mathematics or 2-year M.Sc. in Physics /Mathematics or B.S./B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Engineering Physics/ or M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics and Communication with minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. Must have a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET including LS and/or JRF and/or valid JEST score. Relaxation of marks: 55% for OBC/EWS, 55% for SC/ST/PWD (equivalent CGPA).

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000 Per Month + HRA as applicable

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Tirupati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Tirupati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Tirupati Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

Must have a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET including LS and/or JRF and/or valid JEST score. Relaxation of marks: 55% for OBC/EWS, 55% for SC/ST/PWD (equivalent CGPA).

content_sections.heading: IIT Tirupati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Tirupati Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Tirupati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Tirupati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Tirupati Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Tirupati is 31st July 2026. Ensure you complete all formalities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.S.-M.S. 5-year Integrated in Physics/Mathematics, or a 2-year M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics, or a B.S./B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Engineering Physics, or an M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics and Communication with at least 60% marks. A valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET or JEST score is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow position is 32 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIT Tirupati Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Tirupati will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. In which state and city is IIT Tirupati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati is located in Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
